reasoning: The two mellivu (larger) vloxes are A and I, the biggest ones
The two mellovu vloxes (variant spelling, also large) are C and E
The two kibb vloxes (with solid black legs) are A and C
The two azeltorf (nearly/almost, with outlined legs) vloxes are D and H
The qliqli (baby/youngest) vlox is B, the smallest one
The imxo (most, with extra features) vlox is I
The three ravv vloxes (with solid black legs, excluding kibb A and C) are E, G, and I
The kibbish-zuff vlox (mostly kibb/black with some zuff characteristics) is G
The zuffish-kibb vlox (mostly zuff/outlined with some kibb) is H
First blank before 'ish-' describing the baby vlox B
Second blank after '-ish' forming 'tezzish-kibb' for the baby vlox, matching prehistoric pattern
